nasb.text: each silver dish weighing one hundred and thirty shekels and each bowl seventy; all the silver of the utensils was 2,400 shekels, according to the shekel of the sanctuary;

esv.text: each silver plate weighing 130 shekels and each basin 70, all the silver of the vessels 2,400 shekels according to the shekel of the sanctuary,

cnv.text: 每個銀盤重一公斤半，每個銀碗重八百克；一切器皿的銀子，按聖所的秤，共有二十七公斤零六百克；

ccb.text: 以圣所的秤为准，每个银盘重一公斤半，每个银碗重八百克，共重二十七点六公斤；
